past_24_hours.description: The Destructive Command Guard (dcg) is for blocking dangerous git and shell commands from being executed by agents.
past_24_hours.description_zh: Destructive Command Guard (dcg) 用于阻止代理执行危险的 git 和 shell 命令。

past_24_hours.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
past_24_hours.description_zh: 全球首个开源、智能体视频制作系统。12 条流水线、52 个工具、500 多项智能体技能。将你的 AI 编码助手变成完整的视频制作工作室。

past_24_hours.description: Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.
past_24_hours.description_zh: Orca 是用于管理并行智能体群的 ADE。使用你自己的订阅运行任何编码智能体。支持桌面和移动端。

past_24_hours.description: Never stop coding. Free AI gateway: one endpoint, 160+ providers (50+ free), connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini. RTK+Caveman stacked compression saves 15-95% tokens, smart auto-fallback, MCP/A2A, multimodal APIs, Desktop/PWA.
past_24_hours.description_zh: 永不停歇的编码。免费 AI 网关：一个端点，160+ 提供商（50+ 免费），连接 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor、Cline 和 Copilot 到免费的 Claude/GPT/Gemini。RTK+Caveman 堆叠压缩节省 15-95% 的 token，智能自动回退，MCP/A2A，多模态 API，桌面/PWA。

past_24_hours.description: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.
past_24_hours.description_zh: 高性能代码智能 MCP 服务器。将代码库索引到持久知识图谱中——平均仓库毫秒级处理。支持 158 种语言，亚毫秒查询，减少 99% 的 token。单个静态二进制文件，零依赖。

past_24_hours.description: agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.
past_24_hours.description_zh: 驻留在终端中的智能体多路复用器。

past_24_hours.description: 🌐 DNSHE Official - Stable & Free Subdomains for Developers. Support 180-day renewal window, Anycast DNS, and REST API. (us.ci, cc.cd, de5.net, ccwu.cc)
past_24_hours.description_zh: 🌐 DNSHE 官方 - 为开发者提供稳定且免费的子域名。支持 180 天续期窗口、Anycast DNS 和 REST API。（us.ci、cc.cd、de5.net、ccwu.cc）

past_24_hours.description: A skill that turn any brand into a scrollable 3D world
past_24_hours.description_zh: 一项将任何品牌转化为可滚动 3D 世界的技能。

past_week.description: AI-powered job application framework built on Claude Code. Fork it, fill in your profile, and let Claude evaluate jobs, tailor CVs, write cover letters, and prepare you for interviews.
past_week.description_zh: 基于Claude Code的AI驱动求职应用框架。Fork它，填写你的个人资料，让Claude评估工作、定制简历、撰写求职信，并为你准备面试。

past_week.description: OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite  purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.
past_week.description_zh: OfficeCLI是首个也是最好的专为AI代理构建的Office套件，用于读取、编辑和自动化Word、Excel和PowerPoint文件。免费、开源、单一二进制文件，无需安装Office。

past_week.description: OpenWiki is a CLI that writes and maintains agent documentation for your codebase.
past_week.description_zh: OpenWiki是一个CLI工具，用于为你的代码库编写和维护代理文档。

past_week.description: agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.
past_week.description_zh: 驻留在终端中的代理多路复用器。

past_week.description: Give Claude the ability to watch any video. /watch downloads, extracts frames, transcribes, hands it all to Claude.
past_week.description_zh: 让Claude能够观看任何视频。/watch下载、提取帧、转录，并将所有内容交给Claude。

past_week.description: Open-source AI hackers to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.
past_week.description_zh: 开源AI黑客工具，用于发现并修复你的应用程序漏洞。

past_week.description: Never stop coding. Free AI gateway: one endpoint, 160+ providers (50+ free), connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini. RTK+Caveman stacked compression saves 15-95% tokens, smart auto-fallback, MCP/A2A, multimodal APIs, Desktop/PWA.
past_week.description_zh: 永不停止编码。免费AI网关：一个端点，160多个提供商（50多个免费），连接Claude Code、Codex、Cursor、Cline和Copilot到免费的Claude/GPT/Gemini。RTK+Caveman堆叠压缩节省15-95%的令牌，智能自动回退，MCP/A2A，多模态API，桌面/PWA。

past_week.description: Chrome extension that filters pseudo-brand junk out of Amazon. Buy from real, established brands.
past_week.description_zh: Chrome扩展，过滤Amazon上的伪品牌垃圾。从真正的、成熟的品牌购买。

past_week.description: Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.
past_week.description_zh: Orca是用于管理并行代理群的ADE。使用你自己的订阅运行任何编码代理。可在桌面和移动设备上使用。

past_month.description: Makes your AI agent think like the laziest senior dev in the room. The best code is the code you never wrote.
past_month.description_zh: 让你的AI智能体像房间里最懒的高级开发一样思考。最好的代码是你从未写过的代码。

past_month.description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.
past_month.description_zh: 在工具输出、日志、文件和RAG块到达LLM之前进行压缩。减少60-95%的token，答案不变。提供库、代理、MCP服务器。

past_month.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.
past_month.description_zh: 给你的AI智能体一双眼睛，让它看到整个互联网。读取和搜索Twitter、Reddit、YouTube、GitHub、Bilibili、小红书——一个CLI，零API费用。

past_month.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
past_month.description_zh: 全球首个开源、智能体视频制作系统。12条流水线、52个工具、500+智能体技能。将你的AI编码助手变成完整的视频制作工作室。

past_month.description: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.
past_month.description_zh: 高性能代码智能MCP服务器。将代码库索引到持久知识图谱中——平均仓库毫秒级。支持158种语言，亚毫秒查询，减少99%的token。单个静态二进制文件，零依赖。

past_month.description: LEAKED SYSTEM PROMPTS FOR CHATGPT, CLAUDE, GEMINI, GROK, PERPLEXITY, CURSOR, LOVABLE, REPLIT, AND MORE! - AI SYSTEMS TRANSPARENCY FOR ALL! 👐
past_month.description_zh: 泄露的CHATGPT、CLAUDE、GEMINI、GROK、PERPLEXITY、CURSOR、LOVABLE、REPLIT等系统提示！——AI系统透明化，人人共享！ 👐

past_month.description: LLM 驱动的多市场股票智能分析系统：多源行情、实时新闻、决策看板与自动推送，支持零成本定时运行。  LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system with multi-source market data, real-time news, decision dashboard, automated notifications, and cost-free scheduled runs.
macOS video editor built for AI
A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.
past_month.description_zh: 一款在Mac上使用轻量级虚拟机创建和运行Linux容器的工具。它用Swift编写，针对Apple silicon进行了优化。

past_month.description: Open-source AI hackers to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.
past_month.description_zh: 开源AI黑客工具，用于发现并修复你的应用漏洞。

past_year.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
past_year.description_zh: 您专属的个人AI助手。任何操作系统。任何平台。龙虾风格。🦞

past_year.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
past_year.description_zh: 一个行之有效的智能体技能框架与软件开发方法论。

past_year.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
past_year.description_zh: 智能体性能优化系统。为Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor等提供技能、本能、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发支持。

past_year.description: The agent that grows with you
past_year.description_zh: 与您一同成长的智能体

past_year.description: An agent-managed museum exhibit, built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex — developed and maintained with no human intervention.
past_year.description_zh: 一个由智能体管理的博物馆展品，使用Rust语言结合Gajae-Code / LazyCodex构建——全程无需人工干预进行开发与维护。

past_year.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
past_year.description_zh: 一个单一的CLAUDE.md文件，用于改进Claude Code的行为，源自Andrej Karpathy对LLM编码陷阱的观察。

past_year.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.
past_year.description_zh: 面向真正工程师的技能。直接来自我的.claude目录。

past_year.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
past_year.description_zh: 触手可及的完整AI代理机构——从前端魔法师到Reddit社区忍者，从趣味注入者到现实检验员。每个智能体都是拥有个性、流程和可交付成果的专家。

past_year.description: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA
past_year.description_zh: 使用Garry Tan的精确Claude Code配置：23个定制工具，分别担任CEO、设计师、工程经理、发布经理、文档工程师和QA。

all_time.description_zh: 通过从零开始重建你喜爱的技术来掌握编程。

all_time.description_zh: 😎 关于各种有趣主题的精彩列表

all_time.description_zh: freeCodeCamp.org 的开源代码库和课程。免费学习数学、编程和计算机科学。

all_time.description_zh: 免费 API 的集合列表

all_time.description_zh: 交互式路线图、指南和其他教育内容，帮助开发者发展职业生涯。
